Test: Hemoglobin
    Category: CBC
    Low Meaning: May indicate anemia, blood loss, nutritional deficiency, chronic disease, or kidney issues.
    High Meaning: May indicate dehydration, lung disease, polycythemia, or high altitude adaptation.

Test: RBC
    Category: CBC
    Low Meaning: May indicate anemia, bone marrow suppression, or blood loss.
    High Meaning: May indicate dehydration, lung disease, or polycythemia.

Test: WBC
    Category: CBC
    Low Meaning: May indicate viral infection, bone marrow disorder, autoimmune disease, or chemotherapy effect.
    High Meaning: May indicate infection, inflammation, stress, leukemia, or medication reaction.

Test: Platelets
    Category: CBC
    Low Meaning: May cause bleeding risk due to thrombocytopenia.
    High Meaning: May increase clotting risk due to thrombocytosis.

Test: ALT
    Category: Liver Panel
    Low Meaning: Usually not clinically significant.
    High Meaning: May indicate liver inflammation, hepatitis, fatty liver disease, or drug toxicity.

Test: AST
    Category: Liver Panel
    Low Meaning: Not usually significant.
    High Meaning: May indicate liver damage, muscle injury, alcohol-related liver disease.

Test: ALP
    Category: Liver Panel
    Low Meaning: May indicate malnutrition or zinc deficiency.
    High Meaning: May indicate bile duct obstruction, bone disease, or liver disorder.

Test: Total Bilirubin
    Category: Liver Panel
    Low Meaning: Usually not clinically significant.
    High Meaning: May indicate jaundice, liver dysfunction, bile obstruction, or hemolysis.

Test: Albumin
    Category: Liver Panel
    Low Meaning: May indicate chronic liver disease, kidney disease, or malnutrition.
    High Meaning: May indicate dehydration.

Test: Creatinine
    Category: Kidney Panel
    Low Meaning: May indicate low muscle mass.
    High Meaning: May indicate reduced kidney function or dehydration.

Test: BUN
    Category: Kidney Panel
    Low Meaning: May indicate malnutrition.
    High Meaning: May indicate kidney stress, dehydration, or high protein intake.

Test: eGFR
    Category: Kidney Panel
    Low Meaning: Below 60 may indicate chronic kidney disease.
    High Meaning: Usually not clinically significant.

Test: TSH
    Category: Thyroid Panel
    Low Meaning: May indicate hyperthyroidism.
    High Meaning: May indicate hypothyroidism.

Test: Free T4
    Category: Thyroid Panel
    Low Meaning: May indicate hypothyroidism.
    High Meaning: May indicate hyperthyroidism.

Test: Total Cholesterol
    Category: Lipid Panel
    Low Meaning: Usually not concerning.
    High Meaning: May increase risk of heart disease.

Test: LDL
    Category: Lipid Panel
    Low Meaning: Protective for heart.
    High Meaning: Increases risk of atherosclerosis and heart disease.

Test: HDL
    Category: Lipid Panel
    Low Meaning: Increases cardiovascular risk.
    High Meaning: Protective for heart health.

Test: Triglycerides
    Category: Lipid Panel
    Low Meaning: Usually not concerning.
    High Meaning: Associated with metabolic syndrome and cardiovascular risk.

Test: Ferritin
    Category: Iron Profile
    Low Meaning: Suggests iron deficiency.
    High Meaning: May indicate iron overload, inflammation, or liver disease.

Test: Serum Iron
    Category: Iron Profile
    Low Meaning: May indicate iron deficiency.
    High Meaning: May indicate iron overload.

Test: TIBC
    Category: Iron Profile
    Low Meaning: May indicate iron overload or chronic disease.
    High Meaning: Suggests iron deficiency.

Test: CRP
    Category: Inflammation
    Low Meaning: Normal inflammation level.
    High Meaning: May indicate infection, inflammation, autoimmune disease, or cardiovascular risk.

Test: Procalcitonin
    Category: Infection Marker
    Low Meaning: Normal, bacterial infection unlikely.
    High Meaning: May indicate bacterial infection or sepsis.

Test: Sodium
    Category: Electrolytes
    Low Meaning: May cause confusion, seizures (hyponatremia).
    High Meaning: May indicate dehydration or kidney issues.

Test: Potassium
    Category: Electrolytes
    Low Meaning: May cause muscle weakness or arrhythmia.
    High Meaning: May cause dangerous heart rhythm disturbances.
